title: Picks of Power
description: Spice up your cave adventures with powerful pickaxes!
body:
Picks of POWER!

Tired of boring old mining? Picks of Power brings a fresh set of pickaxes, each with wild, unique abilities that’ll completely change how you explore caves.

### MAIN GOALS: *** Some let you teleport. Others carry your items. One even fights for you. From wide-range tunnel mining to sky-gliding escapes and explosive bursts—this mod turns **every mining trip** into an adventure! With great power comes great responsibility - each tool is fairly hard to craft and have a slight catch to it! More in-game.

POWERFUL PICKS:




### WHAT'S INSIDE?: ***

* **Ender Pickaxe** Mine blocks from a distance and teleport short ranges on right-click. Items zip straight to your inventory like magic. * **Seismic Pickaxe** Slow but mighty. Sneak to mine in a 3×3 area or send out seismic waves that damage enemies—without altering terrain. * **Backpackaxe** Your backpack _is_ the pickaxe. Open it with a click, auto-store your drops, and manage inventory on the go. Just don’t drop it... * **Divine Elytra Pickaxe** Reduces fall damage and lets you soar when sneaking and right-clicking. Fire a divine laser from the ground between flights. * **Pickito-o** A loyal, living pickaxe companion that mines, fights, and follows you around. It never truly breaks and always returns at 1 HP. * **Inferno-Reaver Pickaxe** Auto-smelts while sneaking. Load it with Pyromagic Bolts to fire charged volcanic blasts. Just try not to burn your hands. ### CRAFTING RECIPES & MORE: ***

Some picks are easier to craft, some are harder. But every one of them gives you **powerful and thematic abilities**, that surely WILL NOT disappoint you!  




- Inferno-Reaver Pickaxe is fuled by Pyromagmic Bolts. Remember to load them up!

 

- Pickito-o will always fight for you, but to control its mining sessions, you will need the Pickito-o's Controller.

          

- Both items can be crafted, like shown above!



 


Each pickaxe is easy to learn, with full details explained in-game. No guides, no clutter—just powerful tools made to make mining fun again. Pick your power, hit the caves, and make every dig unforgettable!
### SOME SHOWCASE GIFS: ***

If you wish to use this in a modpack, feel free to do so!
